saints.name: Sunday of Cheesefare: Expulsion of Adam from Paradise

kontakion.text: O Master, Guide to wisdom,  /  Bestower of prudence,  / Instructor of the foolish, and Defender of the poor: /  make firm my heart and grant it understanding.  /  O Word of the Father, / give me speech, for behold, I shall not restrain my lips from crying out to Thee:  / "Have mercy, have mercy on me who have fallen."

saints.name: Uncovering of the relics of the Holy Martyrs at the Gate of Eugenius at Constantinople

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Your tomb, O Savior...”)
O most glorious Martyrs, you foundations of the Church, /  your venerable relics have appeared from the depths of the earth like noetic roses and treasuries of graces.  / They breathe forth the grace of healing and grant the fragrance of life /  to those who lovingly call you blessed.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “As the first fruits...”)
O courageous pillars of faith, victorious Martyrs, who endured various torments for Christ,  /  you remained hidden for many years;  /  and now you appear as a precious treasure in God's Church,  /  borne reverently in the hands of His Hierarch;  /  and to those who ask, you give what is useful to them. /  Therefore, pray for our souls.2

saints.name: Martyrs Maurice and his son, Photinus, and Martyrs Theodore, Philip, and 70 soldiers, at Apamea in Syria

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
O divine Martyrs, you appeared as bright lamps,  / enlightening all of creation with the radiance of your miracles,  / always entreating Christ God on behalf of us all,  / thereby releasing us from our maladies, /  and ever driving away the most profound darkness of ignorance.

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Thalassius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Limnaeus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Baradates, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Saint Athanasius the Confessor of Constantinople

troparion.text: Champion of Orthodoxy, teacher of purity and of true worship, / the enlightener of the universe and the adornment of hierarchs: / all-wise father Athanasius, your teachings have gleamed with light upon all things. / Intercede before Christ God to save our souls.

saints.name: 9 Martyred brothers of Kola: Guram, Adarnerse, Baqar, Vache, Bardzim, Dachi, Juansher, Ramaz, and Parsman

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!
